arts.sum: Former Manchester City winger Sane is out of contract at Bayern Munich this summer fueling speculation over his long-term future. Werner appeared in 18 Premier League matches for Tottenham Hotspur this season – none of them the full 90 minutes – but he didn’t score a goal.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich’s Leroy Sané ready to take lower wages to stay, but club isn’t fully convinced yet
arts.sum: According to a report from kicker journalist Georg Holzner (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich star Leroy Sané is ready to take deal with lower wages in hopes of securing a contract extension with the club. Leroy Sané is determined to stay at Bayern and is ready to sign a new contract with significantly lower wages.

arts.ttl: Sly Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany avoids implication he was scouting at San Siro this week
arts.sum: It was a chance for me to think a step ahead (about Inter) in my free time, but the focus today is only on Augsburg,” Kompany said (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ). “I always watch football in my free time, no matter the team.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 37: Exploring the potential disconnect in Bayern Munich’s organization; Dayot Upamecano wants to talk money; Listener Q&A; and MORE!
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. There has been massive drama surrounding a legendary player and the club executives and the team is steamrolling into key match-ups with FC Augsburg and Inter Milan .

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich CEO making behind-scenes push to repair Thomas Müller situation
arts.sum: CEO Jan-Christian Dreesen is now increasingly involved behind the scenes and wants to smooth things over with Thomas Müller. According to Sport1, CEO Jan-Christian Dreesen is working hard behind the scenes to resolve the matter.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen queue up for Milan’s Malick Thiaw
arts.sum: Given Milan’s poor Serie A season this time around, absolutely no one in their squad is being considered indispensable. Almost anyone can be sold if a good offer comes in…

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayern Munich XI vs Augsburg: Vincent Kompany faces selection headache
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany faces a selection headache with defensive injuries mounting up as Bayern Munich’s injury crisis worsens ahead of their Bundesliga clash at Augsburg. Alphonso Davies and Dayot Upamecano both…

arts.ttl: Augsburg vs. Bayern München preview: League leaders face tough test
arts.sum: Bundesliga leaders Bayern München are set for a tough test as they make the relatively short trip to face an Augsburg side unbeaten in 11

arts.ttl: “I’m still having fun in Munich” — Serge Gnabry talks about his situation at Bayern Munich and his long stay so far
arts.sum: “Seven years in Munich – which I didn’t expect when I first came here – is a long time,” Gnabry said in a recent interview with Manuel Bonke, as captured by @iMiaSanMia . What would Gnabry have expected his time at Bayern Munich to be like when he finally joined the first team in 2018?
